data.name: Projekt Melody: A Nut Between Worlds
data.detailed_description:
You’ve done it! You’ve nutted the big nut and have earned your spot in Valhalla! With your soul untethered, you ascend to your rightful spot in the great mead hall, where endless tales and bottomless ale awaits!

Wait… What’s this about a Goddess? A cyber world to save? Lustful hotties to lay?!

That’s right! You’ve been chosen to go on an epic adventure through the virtual worlds, fighting against a virus threat that wishes to take over the Cyberverse!

But don’t worry, brave adventurer! You won’t have to face this threat alone! You’ll have the chaotic pervert and streamer extraordinaire Projekt Melody by your side!

… What could go wrong?

A variety of waifus and husbandos that you can romance or friendzone to your heart's content!

An extraordinary Hentai AI girl who just loves the smaller things in life, like: Voyeurism! Exhibisionism! Anal! And Paizuri! She’s outgoing and a bit chaotic, but is on a noble quest to experience all the lewd things the world has to offer! After getting partially corrupted, though, she shares a body with none other than.

Melware! ... Melody’s second half, and the future ruler of the world! A queen among queens, she demands nothing but the absolute worship and adoration that she deserves! Think you can handle her?

The once-famous scientist who now spends her days researching the Corruption and building the ultimate sex bots! Blair likes to think of herself as a caring and nurturing person, pushing others to go beyond their limits! In reality, Blair is a hard but fair Dominatrix who’s well-versed in all the sublime pain and pleasure that can be experienced through BDSM!

Also known as “System”, one of Virtual Little Tokyo’s finest agents and one of hundreds of clones - designed and trained to provide peace and safety to the citizens of Virtual Little Tokyo, and to combat the corruption! Serious and professional, clinically efficient and deadly! Yes, that’s right! She’s in serious need of some fucking!

Once just an ordinary slime, she now has legs and these weird big things on her chest! Jellody is aloof and perpetually optimistic! The glass ain’t just half full, it’s fucking delicious! She might seem sweet and innocent, but when she gets hungry, she turns into a ravenous beast with an insatiable appetite!

Calm, collected, badass and over nine feet tall’s worth of Taurus goodness! Chief Mino is the leader of the Taurus tribe, a group of immortal warrior women who pride themselves in their strength and their cunning! She’s on the hunt for the perfect breeding mate!

Silica was crafted to be the perfect android catgirl cafe maid! Maybe! She didn’t exactly read her user manual. It didn’t have enough pictures of her in it! Silica’s on a quest to prove, once and for all, that she’s the greatest cafe maid to have ever lived! Right after she takes this nap… And only if you stop bugging her so much! Go take your own order, dammit!

Bonnie was once known as the Pirate Queen of Blackwater, striking fear into the hearts of merchants all throughout the seas! She’s ruthless and possessive, taking what is hers and claiming whatever catches her eyes! And did we mention that she can communicate with the souls of the dead? Cause, yeah, that’s a thing she can do!

One of the Demon King’s royal guards, Aki is a brash and loud fire Oni, believing nothing is better than a good fight, some good ale, and a good hard fucking! Straightforward and aggressive, she loves to express herself with her fists more than her words!

Another of the Demon King’s royal guards, Aoi was always seen as weak due to an illness the other demons call “emotions”. A soft-spoken and shy ice Oni, Aoi prefers to spend her time tending to her garden rather than doing normal demon activities like orgies and fistfights!

Lee’s an outgoing and positive guy, with a passion for coffee and model kits! He can sometimes be a bit awkward, but loves meeting new people and getting to know them! He once was just a simple architecture student, but now, he’s a corruption cleaner and part-time barista!

That’s right! You’ve died to a nut! The greatest of warrior’s deaths! And as a reward, the Goddess herself has chosen you to be her hero, in order to save her virtual worlds from destruction!

And how, do you ask, does an ordinary person save the entire goddamn Cyberverse from a world-eating Corruption that’s been running rampant?

With a bit of luck, a lot of grit, and above-average sexual skills of course! Not to mention a party of beautiful waifus and husbandos by your side!

Customizable Genitals!

  • Body Type and Skin Color!

  • Customize your character with different body types, skin tones and genitals for a more immersive experience!

Fully Voiced Characters!

  • Each character is fully and uniquely voiced, with Melody naturally voicing herself!

  • We have seasoned anime and hentai voice actresses, to provide high quality interaction with every character, providing you with orgasmic inducing sex dialogue and sounds.

Deep Story!

  • A rich and engaging story, full of whacky scenarios and wholesome moments.

  • Explore the worlds of Cyberspace with a harem of unique characters. Meet new waifus in your pursuit of stopping the virus threat that plagues the lands. Go on a date with your favorite characters and discover the mystery behind Cyberspace!

Action Combat!

  • Fight off the virus threat that’s plaguing the land. Dive in headfirst to engage with your fists in close-combat!

    Explorable World

    • Experience a semi-open world that is fully explorable!

    • Get to experience the world of Projekt Melody!

    • Discover fun side content, unique characters and secret easter eggs!

    Lovense Deep Immersion TOYS!

    • Feel every stroke and thrust with your Lovense Toy, ensuring that you experience hentai the way it was meant to be!

    • Get the full dating experience without the pressures of touching grass! Have you felt like you’ve been missing those after-coitus cuddles and pillow talk from your hentai rawdogging sessions? Well, we’ve heard your pleas, and we’ve got you covered! Full aftercare and pre-pegging buildup, for maximum enjoyment!

    • A variety of waifus that you can romance or friendzone to your heart's content!

    • A riveting main story full of twists, turns, and thrusts! Not to mention the stunning sex experiences full of plot, action and comedy! Wait, that’s wrong…

    • Your sexual experiences, your choice! Choose what kind of kinks you partake, and which partners you fuck! Or don’t! Be the true virgin you were always meant to be!

    • A fully-fleshed sandbox mode, in case you just really want to get to the action and get it quick! Choose where you wanna do it, who you wanna do it with, and what pose you want to do it in! Gone are the days of polite conversations and third dates!

    • Customize your character with a wide array of choices, including genitalia type!

    • Full Lovense integration so you can really feel the love! Experience Hentai the way it was intended!

    This ain’t your ordinary hentai! This is the type of game you come back to over and over, just to double check that that did, indeed, happen!

    We guarantee “What the fuck” moments that’ll leave you laughing uncontrollably!

data.short_description: Experience the world's first and most ambitious NEXT GEN HENTAI GAME! With a bit of luck, above-average sexual skills, and a party of beautiful waifus and husbandos at your side, save the entire goddamn Cyberverse from a world-eating corruption in Projekt Melody: A Nut Between Worlds!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i5 8400 | AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 6GBs VRAM | NVIDIA GTX-1060 | AMD Radeon RX 590
  • 儲存空間: 60 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 720p Low Quality Settings | SSD (Preferred) | HDD (Supported)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i7 8700 | AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GBs VRAM | NVIDIA RTX-2080 | AMD Radeon RX 6700
  • 儲存空間: 60 GB 可用空間
